brief.speaker: pharaoh
brief.text: I would see only the great deliveries. More than two thousand units are significant. Filter for them.

expected.sql: SELECT overseer, year, amount FROM granary WHERE amount > 2000

hints.text: Pharaoh: 'Too many. 2000 is the threshold — only strictly greater.'
Pharaoh: 'Too few. 2000 is the threshold, not 20000.'

success.speaker: pharaoh
success.text: The harvest of kings. Weni. Mereruka. Rahotep. Their work is proof enough.
